name: lms-pesv-education
description: LMS PESV Education — Sistema de Gestión de Aprendizaje

scripts.init: npm ci && concurrently --success all -n api,client -c green,cyan "cd apps/api && npm ci && npx prisma generate" "cd apps/client && npm ci"
scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently -k -n api,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: concurrently --success all -n api,client -c green,cyan "npm run build:api" "npm run build:client"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n api,client -c green,cyan "npm run start:api" "npm run start:client"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently --success all "cd apps/api && npx tsc --noEmit" "cd apps/client && npx tsc --noEmit"
